parameters.name: jql
parameters.value: project = TEAM ORDER BY updated DESC

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `mutation { insert_ai_summaries_one(object: {issue_key: "${$('Flatten Issues').item.json.key}", jira_updated_at: "${$('Flatten Issues').item.json.updated}", tldr: ${JSON.stringify($json.tldr || '')}, status_insight: ${JSON.stringify($json.status_insight || '')}, action_needed: ${JSON.stringify($json.action_needed || '')}, risk_level: ${JSON.stringify($json.risk_level || 'medium')}, risk_reason: ${JSON.stringify($json.risk_reason || '')}, staleness_days: ${$json.staleness_days || 0}, generated_at: "${new Date().toISOString()}"}, on_conflict: {constraint: idx_ai_summaries_issue_key, update_columns: [jira_updated_at, tldr, status_insight, action_needed, risk_level, risk_reason, staleness_days, generated_at]}) { id issue_key } }` }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ query: `mutation { insert_ai_board_summaries_one(object: {jql_hash: "default", jql: ${JSON.stringify($('Prep Board Data').first().json.jql)}, executive_summary: ${JSON.stringify($json.executive_summary || '')}, blocked_tickets: ${JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify($json.blocked_tickets || []))}, stale_tickets: ${JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify($json.stale_tickets || []))}, team_workload: ${JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify($json.team_workload || {}))}, recommendations: ${JSON.stringify(JSON.stringify($json.recommendations || []))}, total_issues: ${$('Prep Board Data').first().json.tickets?.length || 0}, generated_at: "${new Date().toISOString()}"}, on_conflict: {constraint: idx_board_summaries_hash, update_columns: [jql, executive_summary, blocked_tickets, stale_tickets, team_workload, recommendations, total_issues, generated_at]}) { id } }` }) }}
